leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Manual QuickBooks data entry for 40+ SMB clients, manual T4/T4A/ROE preparation at month-end, client onboarding paperwork via chaotic email chains, payroll processing across 40 clients consuming 3 days per month.
leads.pitch: Mosaic Bookkeeping serves 40+ SMB clients with manual QuickBooks data entry consuming hours per client per week. AI agents can extract receipt and invoice data automatically, auto-generate T4s and payroll entries, and handle client onboarding without email back-and-forth — cutting data entry time by 70%.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Screening 100+ resumes per requisition manually, individual candidate outreach with 30% non-response rate requiring re-contact, interview scheduling coordination across candidates and hiring managers consuming 3 FT recruiter hours per week.
leads.pitch: Lynx Staffing screens 100+ resumes per open role and coordinates interviews across multiple time zones — high-volume, repetitive work that's a perfect AI automation target. AI resume screener, personalized outreach sequences with auto-follow-up, and calendar-based interview scheduling — letting your 3 recruiters focus on interviews, not logistics.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Customer service inquiries (order status, substitutions, returns) handled manually by 4 staff, new SKU data entry across website and inventory system taking 45 min per item, subscription box customization for 800+ customers managed via spreadsheet.
leads.pitch: Vert.ca has 800+ subscribers with a customer service team already stretched thin at current volume. AI customer service agent handling order status, substitutions, and returns 24/7, plus SKU listing automation and subscription box customization — freeing the team to focus on sourcing and product quality.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Client project brief collection and clarification emails handled manually, specification document preparation for contractor bids requires manual copying from AutoCAD drawings, timesheet logging by 10 architects done weekly with low compliance.
leads.pitch: Architecture firms like Crestview spend disproportionate time on client communications and billing admin rather than design work. Automated project brief collection, bid spec generation from drawings, and AI timesheet nudging can give architects back 3-5 hours per week.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Patient intake forms and insurance pre-approvals handled manually at each visit, appointment reminders and cancellation rebooking managed by 2 receptionists, clinical report writing to insurance providers and doctors typed manually after each session.
leads.pitch: Ottawa Spine & Sports Rehab is hiring a third receptionist just to manage intake volume — admin is capping growth. Digital pre-visit intake with insurance pre-check, automated appointment reminders with smart rebooking, and AI clinical report writer can eliminate 2 FT admin hours per day.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Load matching and driver assignment done manually via phone and spreadsheets across 30+ daily loads, customer quote generation requiring manual rate lookups, proof of delivery documentation uploaded manually from driver photos.
leads.pitch: Managing 30+ daily loads with manual phone-based driver matching is a massive bottleneck. AI load matching agent, instant quote generator from rate cards, and POD processor can cut ops overhead by 60% and reduce missed deliveries.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Patient appointment reminders and no-show rebooking handled manually by 2 admin staff, insurance predetermination letters typed from treatment plans for 20+ patients daily, recall list of 600+ patients reactivated via manual phone calls each month.
leads.pitch: Dental practices with 600+ active patients spend disproportionate time on recall outreach and insurance paperwork. AI appointment reminder system with smart no-show rebooking, auto predetermination letters, and automated recall campaigns can reduce front desk load by 70%.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Client brief collection across 12 active accounts handled via chaotic email threads, content approval workflows with version confusion and lost feedback, timesheet and project billing for 15 creatives logged manually per fortnight with low compliance.
leads.pitch: Running 12 active client accounts with content approval chaos and timesheet compliance issues is a solvable problem. Structured AI brief portal, visual approval workflow with threaded feedback, and automated billing aggregator can cut ops overhead significantly.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: 20-30 page PDF inspection reports written manually by inspectors after each job (2-3 hours per report), client booking and inspector assignment managed via phone with daily scheduling conflicts, 30-day post-inspection follow-up for ancillary services done manually.
leads.pitch: At 15-20 inspections per week, inspectors spend 2-3 hours writing reports after every job. AI inspection report writer from checklist data and photos, automated booking and scheduling, and 30-day follow-up sequences can recover 30+ hours of inspector time per week.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Tax return data entry from T-slips and financial statements into Taxprep done manually per client, financial statement preparation and XBRL tagging for public companies done manually, client document collection via email with frequent back-and-forth.
leads.pitch: CPA firm with 200+ SMB clients where tax season data entry is still manual is leaving billable hours on the table. AI tax data entry agent, document collection portal with automated reminders, and XBRL-assisted FS preparer can dramatically cut compliance time during peak season.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Customer service for order status, returns, and product availability handled manually by 3 CS staff, product listing creation taking 45 min per SKU, social media content planning across Instagram, Pinterest, and Facebook done manually.
leads.pitch: Growing D2C furniture brands overwhelmed by CS volume as they scale. AI customer service agent integrated with Shopify, product description writer, and social content planner let a small team focus on product and brand rather than operations.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Tenant maintenance request intake and vendor dispatch managed via phone and email by property manager, lease renewals and rent increase notices sent manually to 150+ tenants per quarter, maintenance scheduling across multiple vendors tracked via spreadsheets.
leads.pitch: Managing 150+ residential units across 8 buildings with maintenance requests and lease renewals handled via phone and spreadsheets is unsustainable. AI maintenance request portal with vendor triage, automated lease renewal system, and vendor scheduling coordinator can cut property manager admin by 60%.

leads.industry: Notarial Practice / Real Estate & Estate Law
leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Client document collection for real estate closings managed via email with no tracking, title search and registry queries done manually per transaction, will and estate documents drafted manually from intake notes by notaries.
leads.pitch: Brossard notarial firms face heavy per-transaction document compliance burdens that scale linearly with growth. AI client onboarding portal with document tracking, automated title search assistant, and structured will intake form can reduce per-transaction admin time by 50%.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Sprint status reports written manually by PMs for 6 active client projects, sales inquiry scoping done by senior developers between deliverables, timesheet compliance at 40% on-time rate across 15 developers requiring constant follow-up.
leads.pitch: 15-developer consultancy with manual PM reports and 40% timesheet compliance has AI opportunities across delivery and operations. AI sprint report generation from Jira/git, sales scoping intake form, and frictionless timesheet submission can reduce non-billable admin significantly.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Customer quote inquiries handled manually by 2 office staff during peak spring season, crew scheduling and site assignments for 8 crews managed via whiteboards and phone calls daily, material ordering tracked via paper forms reconciled weekly.
leads.pitch: Spring is make-or-break for landscaping companies and 2 office staff cannot keep up with quote volume while scheduling 8 crews. AI quote request agent on website, crew scheduling optimizer, and material order tracker can turn spring chaos into a streamlined operation.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Broker of record (BOR) change intake handled manually via phone and email, certificate of insurance (COI) requests with 4-6 hour turnaround done manually by assistants, renewal outreach for 80+ commercial accounts managed via spreadsheet reminders and manual emails.
leads.pitch: Commercial insurance brokers with 80+ active accounts lose competitive advantage every time a COI takes 4-6 hours. AI BOR intake portal with instant carrier routing, automated COI processor same-day, and renewal outreach system turn compliance into a competitive weapon.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Weekly menu customization for 40+ corporate clients with dietary restrictions tracked via email and spreadsheets, order taking for 150+ weekly orders handled manually by 2 coordinators, weekly invoice generation and delivery confirmation done manually at week-end.
leads.pitch: Catering company with 40 corporate clients and 150+ weekly orders hiring a third coordinator to manage volume is approaching the ceiling. AI menu customization engine, online ordering portal, and automated weekly invoicing let Amara scale without scaling headcount proportionally.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: HR policy document customization from templates done manually by consultants per client engagement, employee handbook preparation for 10-15 new hires per quarter, ESA and WSIB compliance tracking across 30+ client accounts managed via spreadsheets.
leads.pitch: Montreal HR consultants doing ESA and WSIB compliance tracking across 30+ accounts via spreadsheets have a clear AI leverage point. AI policy customization engine, onboarding document generator, and compliance deadline tracker turn overhead into a high-margin service differentiator.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Student-tutor matching done manually by coordinator reviewing intake notes, trial session booking handled individually by 2 coordinators via phone and email, monthly progress reports for 80+ students written manually by tutors from session notes.
leads.pitch: Tutoring company with 80+ students, 25 tutors, and manual matching consuming coordinator hours daily has a clear automation opportunity. AI student-tutor matcher, online booking portal, and progress report generator dramatically reduce coordinator overhead while improving parent experience.

leads.pain_point_hypothesis: Member onboarding and tour booking across 4 locations managed manually by front desk staff, class schedule management and instructor assignment for 60+ weekly classes done via spreadsheets, renewal outreach for 800+ members via generic email campaigns with low engagement.
leads.pitch: 4-location gym chain with 800+ members and 60+ weekly classes running on spreadsheets and generic email campaigns is leaving retention and upsell revenue on the table. AI onboarding portal, class scheduling optimizer, and personalized renewal campaigns turn retention into a growth driver.
